title: Add Kubariet to terminal GitHub allowlist

log.context: Add Kubariet to terminal GitHub allowlist

Everything is working. Here's the summary:

**Allowlist location:** `/mnt/data/.env.shared`, line 3 — `GITHUB_ALLOWED_USERS` (a shared env file loaded by terminal-server, temporal-proxy, and website services; the old entry in `/mnt/data/terminal/.env` was deprecated and commented out pointing here).

```
GITHUB_ALLOWED_USERS=jhead,jaboostin,koole__,Centronias,BigClungus,campbelln508,lynchifer
```
